description: Single source of truth for fork features. fork-sync.sh builds 'local' from these; fork-drift-check.sh evaluates each 'drift' probe against upstream/main to flag features upstream may have absorbed.

features.summary: Fork maintenance tooling: CHANGELOG merge driver, rerere setup, sync scripts, docs.

drift.note: Tooling is inherently fork-only; upstream will never carry it. Probe stays ACTIVE.

features.summary: Optional toolPath theme token for file paths in tool titles.
Dependency-free 'view: outline' option on the read tool: line-numbered structural summary of source files (bodies elided) for cheap navigation of large files.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream ships its own structural/outline read mode at this path or supersedes it.

features.summary: Adds 'max' thinking level across providers and UI.
Configurable code block border styles in the TUI markdown renderer.
Bounds vitest worker concurrency to prevent host overload.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream ships its own worker-cap script at this path.

features.summary: Linkify existing file paths in markdown inline code (toolPath color + OSC 8 file:// hyperlink); also carries the vscode://file v2 path-link variant. Bash tool-title labeling moved to feat/tool-call-headers.
Color the footer thinking-level indicator per level.
Warn when a custom theme omits optional color tokens.
Surface errors via stderr (avoid TUI corruption), add stack traces, preserve OAuth error cause.
Unit tests for previously untested pure-logic modules across all packages.

drift.note: The branch adds parseChangelog/compareVersions/getNewEntries suites to changelog.test.ts plus 9 fork-only test files (ai/{abort-signals,hash,json-parse,sanitize-unicode}, agent/harness/{messages,shell-output}, coding-agent/mime, tui/{kill-ring,undo-stack}). Upstream now ships changelog.test.ts but only covers normalizeChangelogLinks, so the old path-present probe false-fired. This grep flips REDUNDANT only when upstream absorbs the fork's parseChangelog coverage; re-verify the other files before dropping.

features.summary: Deduplicate truncate/messages/compaction utils between agent and coding-agent.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream exports the shared utilities itself.

features.summary: Prefix rendered reasoning/thinking blocks with a bold [Thinking] header so the trace is unambiguous at a glance (pi normalizes every provider's reasoning channel into one 'thinking' type).

Render every tool call as a bold bracketed [X Tool] header on its own line with args beneath (bash/read/edit/write/ls/grep/find + generic fallback), and collapse multi-line bash commands into a single title line.

Open file paths in-window in the VS Code integrated terminal: emit styled plain text (no OSC 8) so VS Code's link detector resolves the file in the active Remote-WSL/SSH workspace instead of failing or opening a new window. isVscodeTerminal() helper kept local to coding-agent.
In-session to-do / plan tracking as an example extension (TaskCreate/TaskUpdate/TaskList/TaskGet/update_plan + /tasks + .pi/TODO.md export + task-state injection).

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: Single /config command + SettingsList UI backed by a process-global registry other extensions opt into (per-extension settings in one place).

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: /continue + Ctrl+Shift+C to resume the previous task without retyping; queues as follow-up while streaming.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: Opt-in automatic 'pi update --extensions' on startup (/auto-update on|off), OFF by default with a supply-chain caveat.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: /note and /notes commands backed by a single global inbox file for capturing ideas without interrupting a run.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: Automatic session titling from the whole transcript on a widening cadence; /title, /titles, Ctrl+Shift+T, registers a titles toggle into /config.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: Subtle one-line recap after a quiet period via the cheapest available model; registers recaps + recap-model into /config.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: API-key rotation + OAuth refresh across provider pools, plus a secrets block resolving non-provider secrets into process.env at startup. Ships pools.example.json; real pools.json git-ignored.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: Interactive /model selector shows the provider first as a padded [provider] badge so model ids align in a column.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream reworks the selector to lead with the provider badge.

features.summary: OpenAI-compatible streams surface a clear authentication-failure message on HTTP 401/403 naming the provider and the configured API key source (env var / models.json), without echoing the key, instead of an opaque status-code error.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream adds its own auth-failure messaging for 401/403 in openai-completions.

features.summary: Adds pi.getExtensions() to the extension API, returning loaded extensions with canonical name/path/scope/source metadata.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream ships an equivalent getExtensions() on the extension API.

features.summary: web_search/web_fetch tools via Brave Search API with DuckDuckGo Lite fallback; inline result rendering, runtime backend toggle via /config web-search-backend, once-per-session search directive.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: Generic Discord REST API (v10) tool authenticated via DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN; one tool handles any route (messages, channels, roles, guilds, chat summaries). No MCP server.

drift.note: Example extension. REDUNDANT if upstream ships this example at this path.

features.summary: Strip zero-width / invisible 'ghost' code points (ZWSP, word joiner, BOM, soft hyphen, invisible math operators, U+E0000-E007F TAG block) from outgoing text via sanitizeSurrogates, cutting wasted tokens and a hidden-instruction injection channel across all providers. Preserves ZWJ/ZWNJ, bidi marks and emoji variation selectors; opt out with PI_KEEP_GHOST_TOKENS=1.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream adds its own zero-width/ghost-character stripping in sanitize-unicode.
